modelDescription: Departmental-structure decomposition of a hospital system. Top-level entities represent major hospital departments and divisions: ClinicalDepartment, DiagnosticDepartment, SurgicalDepartment, EmergencyDepartment, PharmacyDepartment, AdministrativeDivision, FacilitiesDivision, and InformationTechnologyDivision. Each department composes its constituent spaces, equipment, and resources. Cross-department relationships are expressed through Associations.
